name: ztwim-test
description: AI-powered test generation for Zero Trust Workload Identity Manager (ZTWIM)
author: Sayan Das

commands.name: generate-from-pr
commands.description: Generate pytest test cases from a GitHub Pull Request

commands.name: generate-from-jira
commands.description: Generate pytest test cases from a Jira issue

commands.name: coverage-gap
commands.description: Identify test coverage gaps for ZTWIM components

commands.name: suggest
commands.description: Suggest test cases for a specific ZTWIM component

commands.name: validate
commands.description: Validate generated test files for syntax and framework compliance
